steps.title: Spot the key phrase
steps.content: The key phrase: maintain a rigid distinction while avoiding ______ them (the actor and character). The scholars don't want these two to be treated as the same, so the blank must be a word meaning to merge or blur them.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is: combine or merge two things into one. Conflate does exactly this—it means to treat distinct entities as a single thing. The other three describe unrelated processes that have nothing to do with merging. That matches choice A — A is correct.
